creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.0R/relnotes/#hardware>: 

* noted a promotion to Tier 1
* did not note the demotion, to Tier 2, of FreeBSD/i386. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/relnotes/#hardware> might note the demotion. 

----

<https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/>

<https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-announce/2021-January/002006.html> (2021-01-28): 

> [FreeBSD-Announce] FreeBSD/i386 demoted to Tier 2 for FreeBSD 13.x
